product_name: Harry Potter Creative Maker Kitz - Make Your Own Knight Bus

bullets: MAGICAL EFFECT - Assemble the flat parts and then add LEDs to bring the iconic Harry Potter vehicle, standing tall at 20cm, to life!
CREATE, BUILD AND DISPLAY - This Make Your Own kit allows you to build your own detailed model of the iconic triple decker bus! Once complete, the model can be displayed with pride.
EASY TO BUILD - This Make Your Own kit is easy to build requiring no glue or scissors making it a safe and fun activity for children to do independently or with an adult.
STEM ACTIVITY - This easy to build kit has more than 50 pieces and is great for teaching kids 8 years and above some of the basic principals of STEM.
OFFICIAL LICENSED HARRY POTTER TOY - This official Harry Potter Make Your Own Knight Bus is the perfect gift for any Harry Potter fan!
content.description: Create and build your very own Light-up Knight Bus with the Maker Kitz range! Slide together the parts to make this haphazard, triple-decker bus,  then add the LED lights to bring the model magically to life!​​ Also available from Maker Kitz Make Your Own kits is the iconic Hogwarts school and the beloved Weasley family home.

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Build Kit, 6 x LED Lights, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
